ns0:entry.ns0:title: 4thfever/cultivation-world-simulator
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/4thfever/cultivation-world-simulator
Language: python
基于 AI Agent 工作流的修仙世界模拟器，旨在还原智能、开放的仙侠世界。| An open-source Cultivation World Simulator using Agentic Workflow to create a dynamic, emerging Xianxia world.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: D4Vinci/Scrapling
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/D4Vinci/Scrapling
Language: python
🕷️ An adaptive Web Scraping framework that handles everything from a single request to a full-scale crawl!

ns0:entry.ns0:title: NevaMind-AI/memU
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/NevaMind-AI/memU
Language: python
Memory for 24/7 proactive agents like openclaw (moltbot, clawdbot).

ns0:entry.ns0:title: QwenLM/Qwen-Agent
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/QwenLM/Qwen-Agent
Language: python
Agent framework and applications built upon Qwen>=3.0, featuring Function Calling, MCP, Code Interpreter, RAG, Chrome extension, etc.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: VectifyAI/PageIndex
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/VectifyAI/PageIndex
Language: python
📑 PageIndex: Document Index for Vectorless, Reasoning-based RAG

ns0:entry.ns0:title: agentscope-ai/agentscope
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/agentscope-ai/agentscope
Language: python
Build and run agents you can see, understand and trust.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: alibaba/OpenSandbox
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/alibaba/OpenSandbox
Language: python
OpenSandbox is a general-purpose sandbox platform for AI applications, offering multi-language SDKs, unified sandbox APIs, and Docker/Kubernetes runtimes for scenarios like Coding Agents, GUI Agents, Agent Evaluation, AI Code Execution, and RL Training.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: bytedance/trae-agent
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/bytedance/trae-agent
Language: python
Trae Agent is an LLM-based agent for general purpose software engineering tasks.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: datawhalechina/hello-agents
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/datawhalechina/hello-agents
Language: python
📚 《从零开始构建智能体》——从零开始的智能体原理与实践教程

ns0:entry.ns0:title: hiyouga/LlamaFactory
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/hiyouga/LlamaFactory
Language: python
Unified Efficient Fine-Tuning of 100+ LLMs & VLMs (ACL 2024)

ns0:entry.ns0:title: modelscope/ms-swift
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/modelscope/ms-swift
Language: python
Use PEFT or Full-parameter to CPT/SFT/DPO/GRPO 600+ LLMs (Qwen3.5, DeepSeek-R1, GLM4.5, InternLM3, Llama4, ...) and 300+ MLLMs (Qwen3-VL, Qwen3-Omni, InternVL3.5, Ovis2.5, GLM4.5v, Llava, Phi4, ...) (AAAI 2025).

ns0:entry.ns0:title: muratcankoylan/Agent-Skills-for-Context-Engineering
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/muratcankoylan/Agent-Skills-for-Context-Engineering
Language: python
A comprehensive collection of Agent Skills for context engineering, multi-agent architectures, and production agent systems. Use when building, optimizing, or debugging agent systems that require effective context management.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: ruvnet/wifi-densepose
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/ruvnet/wifi-densepose
Language: python
Production-ready implementation of InvisPose - a revolutionary WiFi-based dense human pose estimation system that enables real-time full-body tracking through walls using commodity mesh routers
